creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Antoine, there are only three ports affected:
 - devel/dia2code+
 - misc/rumprun
 - lang/yap(-devel) 
for all of which we have PRs (and at least in two cases maintainers
have not taken appropriate action for months and months).

Given this is a tradeoff, see Jan's comment #11 re C++ support, okay
to proceed now?
